name: l3_add_author_validation
description: L3: Add input validation and error handling to the authors route

turns.message:
The POST /authors endpoint in src/routes/authors.ts has no input validation. Add proper validation that checks:
1. name is a non-empty string
2. bio is a string
3. born_year is a number

You can either add validation inline or create a validateAuthorInput middleware in src/middleware/validate.ts (similar to the existing validateBookInput). Return 400 with error messages for invalid input.
